textPlain: The link doesn't work.Also missiles already use AI to know where they are, so I'm skeptical that the headline is true.

That's the previous generations of AI which has been rebranded to "machine vision" and "machine learning" rather than "AI" due to the numerous hype crashes making the term AI unpalatable for a generation.It's materially different than "Generative AI" which is the current trend of AI hype, which is what I think the "AI" in the title is referring to.
